space_control: Maximize reachable open area using flood-fill heuristics; evaluate all candidate moves and veto any that lead to self-trapping or closing off escape routes. Space control is the primary objective—never sacrifice connectivity for short-term gain.
food: Eat only when health drops below 40% or when snake length is significantly behind opponent; avoid food in dead-ends or corridors that restrict future movement. Treat food as a survival top-up, not a growth strategy.
combat: Stay defensive and avoid direct confrontation; use space advantage to outmaneuver opponents and force them into tight positions. Prioritize survival and space denial over aggressive pursuit.
